Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors after Game 2 win on Monday** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]

The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2 of their Eastern Conference first-round playoff series on Monday night, securing a commanding 2-0 lead with standout performances from Donovan Mitchell (30 points), James Harden (28 points), and Evan Mobley (25 points
